query: What is your return policy for smartphones?
reference: Smartphones can be returned within 30 days. Items must be in original packaging with no physical damage and require a factory reset. Returns are processed through the online RMA portal or technical support, with refunds issued 5-7 business days after inspection. Return shipping is free with a prepaid label. A 1-year manufacturer warranty is included. There is no restocking fee for unopened items, but a 15% restocking fee applies to opened items.

query: Can I return a laptop after 2 weeks?

reference: Our featured laptop is the TechMart Pro 15 at $1,299. It has an Intel Core i7-13700H processor (14 cores, up to 5.0GHz), 16GB DDR5 RAM (upgradeable to 32GB), a 512GB NVMe SSD, a 15.6-inch FHD IPS display with a 144Hz refresh rate, NVIDIA RTX 4060 6GB graphics, a 72Wh battery rated up to 10 hours, and weighs 4.5 lbs. It is available in Space Gray, Silver, and Midnight Blue, is in stock, and ships in 2-3 business days.

query: What are the specs on your smartphones?
reference: Our featured smartphone is the TechMart Phone X at $899. It has a Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor, 8GB RAM, 256GB of non-expandable storage, a 6.7-inch AMOLED display at 120Hz (2400x1080), a triple camera (50MP main, 12MP ultrawide, 10MP telephoto), a 5000mAh battery with 65W fast charging, Android 14, and 5G, Wi-Fi 6E, and Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity. It comes in Obsidian Black, Pearl White, and Ocean Blue, is in stock, and ships in 1-2 business days.

query: My laptop won't turn on, help me troubleshoot
reference: Acknowledge that a laptop not turning on is frustrating and reassure the customer. Ask one or two diagnostic questions first: what exactly happens when the power button is pressed (any lights, sounds, or fan), and whether anything changed recently such as a drop, spill, or update. Then give a single first step to try: confirm the power cable is firmly connected at both ends and the wall outlet works, and watch for a charge indicator light. Ask the customer to report what happens before moving to the next step.

query: I can't connect to WiFi on my new laptop
reference: Acknowledge that not getting a new laptop online is frustrating and reassure the customer. Give a single first step rather than a full checklist: toggle airplane mode on and then back off, then try reconnecting to the network. Ask the customer to report whether that step worked before moving on.

reference: The TechMart Pro 15 laptop ($1,299) features an Intel Core i7-13700H processor, 16GB DDR5 RAM, a 512GB NVMe SSD, a 15.6-inch 144Hz FHD display, and NVIDIA RTX 4060 graphics. For returns, laptops can be returned within 30 days in original packaging with all accessories and no physical damage, through the online RMA portal or in-store.
